sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: SAIC Appoints AI Expert Paul Eremenko and Cybersecurity Leader Admiral Mike Rogers to Board of Directors
feed.summary: SAIC has appointed AI expert Paul Eremenko and cybersecurity leader Admiral Mike Rogers to its Board of Directors, expanding the board from 11 to 13 members. Both new appointees will serve on the Audit Committee and Technology Committee. Eremenko brings expertise in AI and advanced technology, while Adm. Rogers offers extensive experience in cybersecurity, intelligence, and defense technology.

feed.title: The ALPS SDOG ETF: Value, Dividends, and More
feed.summary: The ALPS Sector Dividend Dogs ETF (SDOG) is highlighted as a high-dividend and value asset with considerable momentum. The article discusses SDOG's strategy, which applies the "Dogs of the Dow Theory" on a sector-by-sector basis using the S&P 500, emphasizing high dividend exposure and an equal-weight methodology to reduce sector risk. It suggests that value stocks, like those held by SDOG, are poised for a continued rebound and can complement growth funds for a more resilient portfolio.

feed.title: SailPoint appoints Levent Besik as Chief Product Officer
feed.summary: SailPoint has appointed Levent Besik as its new Chief Product Officer (CPO) to lead innovation in identity security, particularly in the context of agentic AI. Besik brings extensive experience from Microsoft, Okta, and Google, where he held significant product leadership roles in identity and AI platforms. His appointment is expected to strengthen SailPoint's position as a leader in adaptive identity security solutions for enterprises.

feed.title: Canada's RBC plans to deploy up to C$1 billion to support homegrown companies
feed.summary: Royal Bank of Canada (RBC) announced plans to deploy up to C$1 billion over the coming years to support homegrown Canadian companies with a growth fund and equity investments. CEO Dave McKay stated this initiative aims to shift the narrative of Canadian entrepreneurs seeking foreign capital and often leaving their home market. RBC will focus on helping companies build and scale in Canada, provide lending and advisory services for major projects, and expand into sectors like defense and infrastructure.

feed.title: McKesson CFO Transition Puts Capital Allocation And Valuation In Focus
feed.summary: McKesson (NYSE:MCK) announced the retirement of EVP and CFO Britt Vitalone, with Kenny Cheung set to take over the role on May 29, 2026. This leadership change will shift the responsibility for McKesson's financial decisions and capital allocation to the new CFO. Investors are encouraged to monitor changes in company communication, guidance, and balance sheet strategies as Cheung assumes his new position to assess potential impacts on the stock's future performance.

feed.title: Costco Speeds Checkout And Tests Buzzworthy Products As Valuation Stays Rich
feed.summary: Costco Wholesale is implementing automated pay stations to enhance checkout efficiency and throughput, particularly during peak hours. The company is also seeing high demand for unique products like gold bars and premium non-alcoholic mixes, demonstrating its strategy to test and scale buzzworthy offerings. These operational and product innovations aim to refine Costco's value proposition and maintain member engagement, though its valuation remains rich according to Simply Wall St's analysis.

feed.title: Texas Instruments Joins NVIDIA To Target Humanoid Robots And AI Infrastructure
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (TXN) has partnered with NVIDIA to advance humanoid robot integration, focusing on sensor fusion and real-time control, and expanding AI robotics capabilities with growing exposure to data center applications. This collaboration positions TXN's hardware as a standard for AI-powered industrial systems and humanoid robots, validating Wall Street's conviction in TXN's post-investment cycle for AI-driven demand. Investors should monitor how quickly this partnership translates into design wins and impacts TXN's product mix and capital allocation.

feed.title: Is Synchrony (SYF) Quietly Redefining Health Financing With Its Walmart.com CareCredit Expansion?
feed.summary: Synchrony (SYF) recently announced the expansion of its CareCredit card acceptance to Walmart.com, allowing cardholders to use it for medical supplies, fitness equipment, sleep products, and pet care. This move, coupled with financial literacy grants, aims to broaden Synchrony's reach in health and wellness financing. While supporting growth in health and wellness receivables, the expansion doesn't fully address key risks like partner concentration and emerging payment models.

feed.title: Royal Bank of Canada announces election of directors
feed.summary: Royal Bank of Canada announced that the nominees listed in its Management Proxy Circular dated February 10, 2026, were elected as directors at the Annual Meeting of Common Shareholders. The detailed voting results for each of the 13 elected directors are provided, showing high percentages of votes in favor. Final voting results for all matters will be made available on the RBC website and filed with securities regulators.

feed.title: Occidental Petroleum Just Discovered Oil in an Exploratory Well Off the Gulf of America. Here Are 2 More Stocks That Could Soar as a Result.
feed.summary: Occidental Petroleum recently announced a significant oil discovery at its Bandit site in the Gulf of America, holding over 45% stake in the project. This find is crucial as the Gulf region accounts for about 15% of U.S. oil production and the well could potentially yield 230 million barrels of oil equivalent. Chevron and Woodside Energy Group, who are also stakeholders in the Bandit prospect, stand to benefit alongside Occidental Petroleum from this discovery and the rising oil prices.

feed.title: Starbucks (SBUX) Steals Another Executive from Chipotle. This Time to Improve Its Brand Design
feed.summary: Starbucks has hired Stephen Piacentini from Chipotle Mexican Grill to become its new coffee house design and development officer, aiming to revive its brand design. This move is part of CEO Brian Niccol's "Back to Starbucks" turnaround strategy, which also involved hiring Niccol himself from Chipotle in 2024 and several other former Chipotle executives. The company plans significant expansion in new retail locations in fiscal 2026.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider General Electric (GE) After A 65% One-Year Surge?
feed.summary: General Electric (GE) has seen significant gains over the past few years, leading investors to question its current valuation. While a Discounted Cash Flow analysis suggests GE is "about right" in its current pricing at around US$280.47 compared to its market price of US$308, the article cautions that valuation can change rapidly. The price-to-earnings (P/E) ratio also aligns with industry averages, indicating fair valuation based on current fundamentals, but two "narratives" are presented for investors to consider a bull case (fair value US$357.24) and a bear case (fair value US$296.86).

feed.title: Broadridge (NYSE: BR) director receives dividend-linked stock unit awards
feed.summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions director Annette L. Nazareth received two awards of common stock (Deferred Stock Units) totaling 33 shares, reported on April 8, 2026. These units, granted at $0.00 per share, are dividend-linked and vest upon grant, settling in shares when she separates from service. Following these awards, Nazareth directly holds 9,369 shares of Broadridge common stock.

feed.title: Broadridge (BR) director Brett Keller receives additional deferred stock unit awards
feed.summary: Broadridge (BR) director Brett Keller was granted additional Deferred Stock Units (DSUs) as compensation, totaling 80 shares (54 and 26 units). These awards are tied to the company's regular quarterly dividend and were issued under the 2018 Omnibus Award Plan and Director Deferred Compensation Program. The DSUs vest immediately but will only settle in shares upon Keller's separation from service, reflecting routine compensation rather than an open-market transaction.

feed.title: Tesla's lower-cost EV plan seen boosting volume, risking margins
feed.summary: Tesla's plan to develop a smaller, lower-cost EV is expected to boost sales and address slowing demand, especially in competitive markets like China. However, investors and analysts warn that this strategy could further strain Tesla's already pressured profit margins. The move comes as Tesla faces increasing competition and weakening demand, indicated by a significant gap between production and deliveries.

feed.title: HII Hosts PAE Maritime Christopher Miller at Ingalls Shipbuilding
feed.summary: HII hosted Christopher Miller, the U.S. Navy’s portfolio acquisition executive for maritime (PAE Maritime), at its Ingalls Shipbuilding division. During his visit, Miller received updates on current ship programs, facility investments, and Ingalls' expanding production capacity. The visit highlighted HII's commitment to strengthening the Navy's fleet and the critical role of the shipbuilding industry in national defense.

feed.title: KLA Corp Stock (KLAC) Moved Up by 3.62% on Apr 9: Key Drivers Unveiled
feed.summary: KLA Corp (KLAC) stock rose by 3.62% today, driven by strong growth in the semiconductor equipment market, strategic company actions such as a $7 billion share repurchase and a 21% dividend increase, and positive analyst sentiment. The company's optimistic outlook for 2026 and 2030, along with its dominant market share in process control, further contributed to investor confidence despite some valuation concerns. Technical indicators show a buy signal with a MACD of 13.05, while its P/E ratio of 44.35 suggests potential overvaluation.

feed.title: What's Going On With Oracle Stock Thursday?
feed.summary: Oracle (NYSE: ORCL) shares are declining on Thursday despite the company introducing new Fusion Agentic Applications across customer experience, HR, finance, and supply chain, and updates to its AI Database. These new applications aim to automate tasks using AI agents, and the company also expanded its Financial Crime and Compliance Management platform. Analysts maintain a "Buy" rating for Oracle with an average price target of $249.26, and the next earnings report is estimated for June 10, 2026.

feed.title: BforeAI Highlighted in Gartner Research on Preemptive Cybersecurity Trends
feed.summary: BforeAI has been highlighted in an April 2026 Gartner report specializing in emerging preemptive cybersecurity trends. The research emphasizes the growing importance of automated moving target defense, predictive threat intelligence, and autonomous exposure management in combating AI-driven cyberattacks. Gartner projects that preemptive cybersecurity solutions could comprise 50% of IT security spending by 2030, a significant increase from less than 5% in 2024, indicating a substantial market shift towards predictive security segments.

feed.title: Ryder System (R) Receives Updated Analyst Rating from Citigroup | R Stock News
feed.summary: Citigroup analyst Ben Mohr has maintained a "Buy" rating for Ryder System (R) but lowered the price target from $245.00 to $239.00. Despite the slight reduction in the price target, the continued "Buy" recommendation reflects Citigroup's ongoing confidence in the company's future performance. Wall Street analysts forecast an average target price of $228.38 for Ryder System, implying a 3.46% upside from the current price, while GuruFocus estimates a downside of 28.16% based on its GF Value.

feed.title: POWER SOLUTIONS INTERNATIONAL, INC. (PSIX) DEADLINE ALERT
feed.summary: Bernstein Liebhard LLP reminds investors of Power Solutions International, Inc. (NASDAQ: PSIX) about an upcoming deadline for a securities fraud class action lawsuit. Investors who purchased shares between May 8, 2025, and March 2, 2026, and incurred losses, are encouraged to contact the firm to discuss their legal rights and options, with the lead plaintiff deadline set for May 19, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that the company made misrepresentations regarding its ability to meet sales demand for power systems solutions, particularly in the data center market.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams stock: Solid earnings amid market gains – what investors need to know
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams recently reported strong quarterly results, beating earnings expectations and raising its dividend, leading to a jump in share price. The company, a global leader in paints and coatings, demonstrates resilience through its diversified operations, strong brand portfolio, and pricing power despite softer housing market demand. While analysts generally hold a positive outlook, investors should consider the current high valuation and monitor housing market trends and raw material costs.

feed.title: Costco sales surge in March
feed.summary: Costco Wholesale Corporation experienced robust sales growth in March, with net sales increasing by 11.3% year-over-year. This surge was driven by strong performance in both domestic and international markets, elevated traffic, and significant growth in digital sales and ancillary categories like gasoline and pharmacy. Jefferies analysts noted that core comparable sales rose 6.2%, and the company's shares have appreciated about 20% year-to-date.

feed.title: Rep. Gilbert Ray Cisneros, Jr. Purchases Shares of RBC Bearings Incorporated (NYSE:RBC)
feed.summary: Representative Gilbert Ray Cisneros, Jr. recently purchased between $1,001 and $15,000 worth of RBC Bearings Incorporated (NYSE:RBC) shares on March 3rd, disclosed on April 7th. This trade occurred within his "150 MAIN STREET TRUST > BANK OF AMERICA" account. Cisneros also engaged in several other stock transactions in late March, including purchases in StandardAero, FirstService, LPL Financial, and DoorDash, and sales in MACOM Technology Solutions, Charles Schwab, Advanced Energy Industries, Flex, and Viavi Solutions, along with a larger purchase in Fabrinet.

feed.title: RPM International (NYSE:RPM) Given New $121.00 Price Target at Morgan Stanley
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has raised its price target for RPM International (NYSE:RPM) to $121.00 from $118.00, maintaining an "equal weight" rating and suggesting a 7.27% upside. This adjustment comes after RPM beat Q3 earnings expectations with $0.57 EPS and $1.61 billion in revenue, driving a recent share rally. The company currently has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with a $125.75 average price target.

feed.title: New SAIC (NASDAQ: SAIC) directors join board, audit and tech panels
feed.summary: Science Applications International Corporation (SAIC) filed an amended 8-K report to correct biographical information for new director Paul Eremenko. The filing confirms that Eremenko and Admiral Michael Rogers joined SAIC's Board of Directors on April 8, 2026, expanding the board from eleven to thirteen members, with both serving on the Audit Committee and Technology Committee. They will receive standard pro-rated compensation and can participate in the Company’s Deferred Compensation Plan.

feed.title: Richardson Electronics (RELL) Earnings Call
feed.summary: Richardson Electronics (NASDAQ:RELL) reported its third-quarter fiscal 2026 results, showing its seventh consecutive quarter of year-over-year sales growth, driven primarily by strong performance in its Power and Microwave Technologies (PMT) segment. The company highlighted significant backlog growth, strategic investments in green energy solutions (GES), and the completion of a major inventory build for a critical supplier, positioning it for continued revenue growth and improved profitability. Management also addressed initiatives for recurring revenue and potential opportunities in advanced semiconductor technologies and wind turbine markets.

feed.title: New RGA (RGA) director Peter Babej begins insider reporting with Form 3
feed.summary: Peter Babej has been appointed as a new director at Reinsurance Group of America Inc (RGA) and has filed an initial Form 3 with the SEC. This filing establishes his status as a reporting insider but does not indicate any transactions or beneficial ownership of RGA securities at this time. The Form 3 is a mandatory step for new insiders to report their initial holdings and prepare for future ownership updates.

feed.title: FirstEnergy Corp. Appoints Brian Harrell as Vice President and Chief Security Officer
feed.summary: FirstEnergy Corp. has appointed Brian Harrell, a former senior U.S. homeland security official, as its new Vice President and Chief Security Officer. In this role, Harrell will be responsible for enhancing the company's enterprise security, focusing on strengthening defenses, expanding intelligence-driven detection, and integrating security into operational planning. He will oversee corporate and field security, cybersecurity, threat intelligence, and risk and compliance, reporting directly to Chief Operating Officer Toby Thomas.

feed.title: Occidental Petroleum Just Discovered Oil in an Exploratory Well Off the Gulf of America. Here Are 2 More Stocks That Could Soar as a Result.
feed.summary: Occidental Petroleum (OXY) has announced a significant oil discovery in the Bandit site off the Louisiana coast, within the area now referred to as the Gulf of America. This exploratory well, potentially one of the deepest, contains high-quality oil-bearing Miocene sands. Beyond Occidental, Chevron (CVX) and Woodside Energy Group (WDS) are also stakeholders in the Bandit project, and all three companies stand to benefit from this discovery, especially given its potential to yield 230 million barrels of oil equivalent.

feed.title: SYF: JP Morgan Lowers Price Target, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: JP Morgan analyst Richard Shane has lowered the price target for Synchrony Financial (SYF) from $84.00 to $73.00, while maintaining a 'Neutral' rating. This adjustment reflects a 13.10% decrease in the price target and follows similar actions by other analysts who have also reduced their price targets for SYF, though some have kept or upgraded their ratings. Synchrony Financial operates as the largest provider of private-label credit cards in the U.S. and continues to receive varied assessments from financial analysts.

feed.title: Solaris Resources (NYSE: SLSR) secures EIA approval and US$50M Royal Gold tranche
feed.summary: Solaris Resources has received technical approval for the Environmental Impact Assessment (EIA) for its Warintza copper project in Ecuador, a significant de-risking milestone after a multi-year government review. This approval unlocks a US$50 million second tranche of funding from its existing US$200 million agreement with Royal Gold, strengthening Solaris' balance sheet. The company is targeting a fully permitted project by the end of 2026.

feed.title: General Dynamics will webcast first-quarter results on April 29
feed.summary: General Dynamics (NYSE: GD) announced it will webcast its 2026 first-quarter financial results conference call on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. EDT. The live webcast and a replay will be accessible via the company's website, www.gd.com. Historically, similar webcast announcements have had minimal impact on stock price, with investors typically focusing more on the actual earnings release.

feed.title: American Water Awards 2026 Scholarship to Emily Bores
feed.summary: American Water has awarded its 2026 scholarship, valued at $5,000, to Emily Bores, a Ph.D. student at the University of South Carolina. Her research focuses on improving harmful algal bloom monitoring programs in South Carolina. This scholarship highlights American Water's commitment to fostering the next generation of water professionals and driving innovation in the water industry.

feed.title: Southern Co. Stock Could Join Dividend Aristocrats. Why It May Return 10%.
feed.summary: Southern Co. is set to become a new member of the Dividend Aristocrats index, offering investors steady dividend payouts amid market uncertainty. The company's consistent earnings growth and a 3% yield are expected to contribute to a potential 10% return this year. This makes it an attractive option for those seeking dependable income.

feed.title: Horizon Kinetics (TPL) logs small Texas Pacific Land insider share purchase
feed.summary: Horizon Kinetics Asset Management LLC, a more-than-10% owner of Texas Pacific Land Corp (TPL), reported an open-market purchase of 1 common share for $447.12 on April 7, 2026, increasing its direct holdings to 3,435,489 shares. The filing also noted a reduction of 25,808 shares from beneficial ownership due to the unexpected passing of director Mr. Stahl, as these shares are no longer subject to Section 16 reporting. Although a small transaction, the filing provides transparency into institutional ownership and reporting adjustments.

feed.title: University of South Carolina Ph.D. student wins $5,000 water scholarship
feed.summary: American Water (NYSE: AWK) has awarded its 2026 American Water Works Association (AWWA) scholarship to Emily Bores, a Ph.D. student at the University of South Carolina. The $5,000 annual scholarship supports graduate-level water research, with Bores being recognized for her work on cyanobacteria identification and quantitative PCR monitoring of toxin-producing genes to improve harmful algal bloom detection. The award highlights American Water's commitment to investing in future water professionals and advancing innovation in water quality and research.

feed.title: TE Connectivity Insider Sold Shares Worth $2,098,674, According to a Recent SEC Filing
feed.summary: An insider at TE Connectivity plc (TEL) recently sold shares valued at $2,098,674, as indicated by a recent SEC filing. This transaction follows other recent insider share sales and comes alongside news regarding dividend increases and updated analyst price targets for the company. TE Connectivity is a global industrial technology company focusing on connectivity and sensor solutions across various sectors including transportation, industrial, and communications.

feed.title: Exxon Mobil expects production drop and billions of dollars of negative impacts from Iran war
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil expects a significant impact on its first-quarter production due to the ongoing war with Iran, estimating a 6% drop. The company also anticipates billions of dollars in negative financial impacts resulting from timing effects as oil prices experience an increase because of the conflict.

feed.title: PinkPantheress fronts UGG campaign as Coachella debut nears
feed.summary: UGG (a division of Deckers Brands) has announced British singer, songwriter, and producer PinkPantheress as the face of its new social-first campaign, ahead of her Coachella debut. The campaign highlights PinkPantheress embodying the brand's feeling of "softness meets confidence and comfort becomes expression," featuring her in various UGG styles like the Tazz, Quill Ballet Sneaker, and GoldenGlow Embossed. The collaboration aims to showcase the shared cultural impact and high-fashion sensibility between the artist and the UGG brand.

feed.title: Banco Santander passes halfway mark in latest share buyback programme
feed.summary: Banco Santander has utilized about half of its current share buyback program, investing approximately €2.71 billion, which accounts for 53.8% of the authorized maximum. Since 2021, the bank has repurchased roughly 16.8% of its shares, showcasing a strong capital position and commitment to returning value to shareholders through capital returns. This ongoing buyback activity reflects Santander's confidence in its financial strength and future prospects.

feed.title: Corning Stock Is Tracking a New Record. It’s Because of AI.
feed.summary: Corning Inc. stock is approaching a new record high, driven by the increasing demand for optical networking technologies fueled by artificial intelligence. The 175-year-old glass manufacturer is positioned to significantly benefit from this AI-driven market trend.

feed.title: Norwegian Cruise Line (NYSE:NCLH) Price Target Cut to $23.00 by Analysts at Morgan Stanley
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley cut its price target for Norwegian Cruise Line (NCLH) from $24.00 to $23.00, maintaining an "equal weight" rating, which suggests a 13.81% upside from the current price. This follows NCLH reporting Q1 EPS of $0.28, beating estimates, but missing revenue consensus and issuing lower Q1 and FY 2026 EPS guidance. The stock currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, but faces challenges with high leverage and low liquidity.

feed.title: QVC Group Teetering on the Brink of Survival
feed.summary: The QVC Group, comprising brands like QVC, HSN, and Ballard Designs, is facing significant financial distress, as evidenced by its delayed annual report filing and downgrades from ratings firms such as Fitch and Moody's. The company has acknowledged "substantial doubt" about its ability to continue as a going concern, following quarters of declining revenues, consolidations, and layoffs. Despite a history of innovation in home shopping, QVC Group struggles to compete with modern retail formats and attract new generations of shoppers.

feed.title: Dimensional Fund Advisors reports 8.3% stake in Scholastic (NASDAQ: SCHL)
feed.summary: Dimensional Fund Advisors has reported an 8.3% beneficial ownership stake in Scholastic Corp (NASDAQ: SCHL) through an amended Schedule 13G/A filing. As of March 31, 2026, Dimensional owns 1,734,301 shares, holding sole voting power over 1,704,732 shares and sole dispositive power over all 1,734,301 shares. The filing specifies that these shares are held by various funds managed by Dimensional, which disclaims beneficial ownership.

feed.title: TE Connectivity (TEL) exec exercises options, sells 9,400 shares under plan
feed.summary: TE Connectivity executive Shadrak W. Kroeger exercised stock options for 9,400 Common Shares at $93.63 each and subsequently sold all 9,400 shares in open-market transactions on April 8, 2026. The sales, executed at weighted average prices of $223.72 and $222.85 per share, were conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted in November 2025. After these transactions, Kroeger directly holds 25,976 Common Shares.

feed.title: ResMed (NYSE:RMD) CEO Michael Farrell Sells 4,991 Shares
feed.summary: ResMed (NYSE:RMD) CEO Michael Farrell sold 4,991 shares of the company's stock on April 7th for over $1.1 million, reducing his direct stake by 1.06%. This transaction was conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates with $2.81 EPS and revenue up 11% year-over-year.

feed.title: Dimensional Fund Advisors (SFNC) reports 4.3% ownership of Simmons First common stock
feed.summary: Dimensional Fund Advisors has reported a 4.3% ownership stake in Simmons First National Corp (SFNC) common stock through a Schedule 13G/A filing. Dimensional Fund Advisors holds beneficial ownership over 6,245,676 shares, with sole voting power over 6,123,303 shares. The firm disclaims direct beneficial ownership, stating the shares are held by various investment funds it advises or sub-advises.

feed.title: YieldMax GOOGL option income strategy ETF announces weekly distribution of $0.0854
feed.summary: The YieldMax GOOGL Option Income Strategy ETF (GOOY) has announced a weekly distribution of $0.0854 per share for its shareholders. The record date for this distribution is April 11, 2024, with payment to be made on April 12, 2024. This announcement provides key financial details regarding the ETF's regular shareholder returns.

feed.title: Inside downstream correspondent banking – and why it matters
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank's Matthew Probershteyn discusses the evolving perception of risk in downstream correspondent banking. He explains how regulatory changes and industry initiatives, such as the Wolfsberg Group's DDQ and ISO 20022 adoption, are strengthening control frameworks and transparency. The article highlights how multiple layers of oversight and collaboration are transforming downstream banking into "access banking" for a more resilient and inclusive global financial system.
